Join NICAR on the Internet

October 1995
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

Instructions for subscribing to NICAR and IRE listservs where journalists can discuss reporting techniques and professional development.

Don't forget to keep up with NICAR on the Internet. Subscribe to our listserve and join in as reporters talk about how to do the job better. E-mail listserv@mizzou1.missouri.edu In the message, on the first line, write: subscribe nicar-1 your name. To join IRE on the Internet, the instructions are the same except, on first line, write: subscribe ire-1 your name.
